rooms.title: Deluxe Ocean View
rooms.description: Wake up to panoramic ocean views in this elegantly appointed room featuring a private balcony, king-size bed, and luxury amenities.

rooms.title: Classic Room
rooms.description: A beautifully designed room with modern furnishings, plush bedding, and all the comforts of home for a restful stay.

rooms.title: Deluxe Suite
rooms.description: Spacious suite with separate living area, lake views, and premium bath amenities for the ultimate relaxation experience.

rooms.title: Ocean View Seagull
rooms.description: Premium beachfront room with floor-to-ceiling windows, private terrace, and direct beach access.

rooms.title: Presidential Suite
rooms.description: The pinnacle of luxury — a lavish suite with panoramic views, private pool, and personalized concierge service.

rooms.title: Garden Villa
rooms.description: Secluded villa surrounded by tropical gardens, featuring an outdoor shower and private dining pavilion.

services.title: Fitness Center
services.description: State-of-the-art equipment with personal trainers available.

services.title: Fine Dining
services.description: World-class cuisine with ocean views and live music.

services.title: Infinity Pool
services.description: Stunning beachfront pool with cabana service and poolside bar.

services.title: Luxury Spa
services.description: Rejuvenate with traditional Balinese treatments and therapies.

testimonials.text: Incredible experience at The Beach Hotel. The level of hospitality is unmatched — the restaurant is beautifully appointed and the pool cabanas, poolside beverages and food were a 10. The service was impeccable.
testimonials.author: John Doe

testimonials.text: A truly magical stay. Every detail was thoughtfully curated, from the welcome drinks to the sunset dinners on the beach. We will definitely be coming back for our anniversary.
testimonials.author: Tony Chester

testimonials.text: The Presidential Suite exceeded all expectations. Private pool, breathtaking views, and a personal butler who anticipated our every need. Pure luxury at its finest.
testimonials.author: Sophia Loren
